media_generation.notes: Set explicit booleans before L4C. Do not infer media generation permission from spec names.

notes: Copy this template to tmp/outputs/ or a private location before filling it.
For the protected workflow, bind plan_record_ref and approval_record_ref to the exact logical audit refs supplied at dispatch.
Bind workflow_run_ref to GITHUB_RUN_ID:GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT and commit_sha to the exact GITHUB_SHA before approving the protected job.
Set media_generation.fast_allowed=true only when the exact Fast media single-submit spec is approved.
Do not store API keys or provider secrets in this file.
template_only must be false and status must be approved before the validator can pass.
